TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sena', title = Sena', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sena'} }

S.FORM: alang Sena' ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 140 buwan, 335 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 45% kyan ku 150 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 55% kyan ku 185 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 44%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Sena' hya' ga Cilafinan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sena' ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 140 buwan, 335 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 45% kyan ku 150 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 55% kyan ku 185 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 44%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Sena' hya' ga Cilafinan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕenaʔ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕenaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨila*inan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
